title: 日本ダービーの後に・完走！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket runs with everything she can
muster, but ultimately fails to win the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Frustrated at letting her dream slip through her
fingers, she bursts into tears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once she calms down, she comes to the happy
realization that even though she lost, she still
gave her fans the thrill of an incredible race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a smile, she tells me that she'll show them
another amazing race at the Kikuka Sho.
